title: ITALY enforcement action against Radio Immagine Uno S.r.l. (10,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Italian DPA has imposed a fine against Radio Immagine Uno S.r.l. The controller, who operates the news outlet Lunanotizone.it, published an article about a criminal procedure involving a data subject. The article was in breach of local press law, and the data subject requested that the c...
